WITH cte AS (
  SELECT y.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
  GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_cte AS (
  SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
  FROM cte
  GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest AS (
  SELECT cte.CustomerID, cte.Segment, cte.total_consumption
  FROM cte
  JOIN min_cte ON cte.Segment = min_cte.Segment AND cte.total_consumption = min_cte.min_consumption
)
SELECT
  (SELECT total_consumption FROM lowest WHERE Segment='SME') -
  (SELECT total_consumption FROM lowest WHERE Segment='LAM') AS SME_LAM_diff,
  (SELECT total_consumption FROM lowest WHERE Segment='LAM') -
  (SELECT total_consumption FROM lowest WHERE Segment='KAM') AS LAM_KAM_diff,
  (SELECT total_consumption FROM lowest WHERE Segment='KAM') -
  (SELECT total_consumption FROM lowest WHERE Segment='SME') AS KAM_SME_diff;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH seg_pct AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2012,
         SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2013,
         ((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
          SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS pct_increase
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM seg_pct
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM seg_pct
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
